docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,255.97 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, GABRIELA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-17-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $55.00- SERVED SEP-05-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, GABRIELA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, GABRIELA $1,084.00 PRINCIPAL, $192.91 INTEREST, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,381.91, $1000.00 PRINCIPAL BALANCE PLUS $84.00 IN ADMINISTRATION AND LATE FEES PLUS CONTRACT INTEREST ON PRINCIPAL BALANCE AND ADMINISTRATION FEE ONLY FROM 4/18/2018. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-17-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-17-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. REPRESENTED BY PRISCILLA TOVAR, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT GABRIELA GONZALEZ DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-17-2018 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
